text_prompt:
You are an environmental analyst. Given the following satellite image description, determine whether the area is at environmental risk. Consider deforestation, soil erosion, water pollution, urban sprawl, loss of biodiversity, and any other factors. Answer with a JSON object containing exactly two keys:
  "danger" – either "Y" or "N"
  "justification" – a short explanation (1-3 sentences).
Return ONLY the JSON object, no extra text.
